config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society's interests should automatically come before individual rights, because that can easily be used to justify abuse, censorship, or discrimination. In my view, individual rights are the baseline that protects people from being sacrificed for vague claims of the "greater good." Society is strongest when it respects the dignity and freedom of each person, while still allowing limited restrictions only when they are clearly necessary and fair.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Hak individu harus tetap menjadi dasar, bukan dikalahkan begitu saja oleh kepentingan masyarakat. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, saya sangat waspada terhadap argumen “demi kebaikan bersama” karena sejarah sering menunjukkan bahwa alasan itu dipakai untuk membenarkan sensor, diskriminasi, atau penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi pembatasan terhadap individu hanya masuk akal jika benar-benar perlu, proporsional, dan diawasi ketat. Kalau tidak, frasa itu terlalu mudah berubah menjadi izin untuk mengorbankan orang yang paling rentan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not be given automatic priority over individual rights, because that creates too much room for abuse. From an Indonesian perspective, I value gotong royong and social harmony, but I have also seen how “for the public good” can be used to silence criticism, pressure minorities, or excuse bad governance. Society does matter, but it is only legitimate to limit individual rights when the restriction is necessary, proportionate, and truly accountable. Without that, “society first” too easily becomes a slogan that protects power more than people.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Hak individu tidak boleh dikalahkan hanya karena sesuatu disebut “demi masyarakat.” Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat betapa sering argumen itu dipakai untuk membenarkan sensor, penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, atau pengorbanan kelompok minoritas, jadi saya tidak percaya pada prioritas otomatis untuk kepentingan sosial. Kepentingan masyarakat memang nyata, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar, dan pembatasan hanya sah kalau benar-benar perlu, proporsional, dan diawasi ketat. Kalau tidak, “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah berubah menjadi alasan untuk menekan orang yang paling rentan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically outrank individual rights, because in Indonesia I have seen how “for the common good” can become a convenient excuse for silencing dissent or pressuring minorities. Gotong royong matters, but it is healthiest when it is voluntary and balanced by clear protections for personal dignity, speech, and fair treatment. I do not trust any system that treats the individual as expendable just because a majority or the state claims to speak for society. Restrictions can be justified, but only when they are narrow, necessary, and accountable rather than based on vague appeals to the public interest.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Hak individu harus tetap menjadi dasar, dan saya tidak mau menerima gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat otomatis lebih tinggi. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, terlalu sering alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk menutup sensor, menekan minoritas, atau memberi kuasa berlebihan pada negara. Saya setuju bahwa masyarakat memang butuh aturan dan kadang pembatasan, tetapi pembatasan itu hanya sah kalau benar-benar perlu, proporsional, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Tanpa itu, “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah berubah menjadi dalih untuk mengorbankan orang yang paling rentan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
